from/among you all (preposition in يَكُن مِّنكُمْ عِشْرُونَ - if there are among you twenty)
they will overcome (referring to the twenty patient believers)
a thousand (object being overcome in يَغْلِبُوا)
not at all (negates يَفْقَهُونَ - they understand)
they understand deeply (referring to those who disbelieve)
away from you all (object of خَفَّفَ - He lightened)
and he knew (connected to خَفَّفَ - He lightened)
that/indeed (introduces the fact that there is weakness)
weakness (object of عَلِمَ - what Allah knew)
and if/then if (connects to previous statement)
with (connected to ٱلصَّابِرِينَ - the patient ones)
the earth/land/ground (being acted upon by فِى)
and Allah (as the subject of عَزِيزٌ حَكِيمٌ)
if not for (connecting to كِتٰبٌ - a decree)
he came before (referring to كِتٰبٌ - decree)
surely would have touched/affected you all (as a consequence in لَوْلَا - if not for)
in what (referring to أَخَذْتُمْ - what you took)
you all took (referring to the Muslims being addressed)
from what (of غَنِمْتُمْ - what you obtained as war booty)
you all gained (referring to the Muslims being addressed in this ayah about war spoils)
as lawful/permissible (describing what you should eat from غَنِمْتُمْ)
as good, pure and delicious food (object of فَكُلُوا)
and you all protect yourselves! (connected to فَكُلُوا۟ - so eat)
Allah (The One True God, as the object of وَٱتَّقُوا۟)
in/within (location word for أَيْدِيكُم - your hands)
your hands (referring to the prisoners of war being addressed)
if (introduces condition for يَعْلَمِ - He knows)
something better (object of يُؤْتِكُمْ - He will give you)
he will give you all (object of يَعْلَمِ - if He knows)
any good/goodness (that Allah knows in your hearts)
from what (that was taken from you)
And Allah (as the subject of يَغْفِرْ - forgives)
one who constantly forgives (attribute of اللَّهُ)
from (connects قَبْلُ to the previous statement)
so He made possible/enabled (something) (connected to خَانُوا۟ - they betrayed)
and they migrated (specifically for religious reasons)
in (location in سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ - the path of Allah)
some of them (referring to the believers mentioned earlier)
and not (negates past meaning of يُهَاجِرُوا۟)
until, up to, so that (connects to يُهَاجِرُوا۟)
they migrate (referring to those who haven't yet migrated)
in (connects سَبِيلِ with what comes before it)
and between them (referring to قَوْمٍ - people)
you (all) are doing (referring to the believers mentioned earlier in the ayah)
you (plural) do it (referring to forming alliances mentioned earlier in 8:73)
there would be (in the conditional phrase 'if you don't do it')
and they migrated (referring to the believers mentioned before)
those (pointing to the believers mentioned before)
truly/really (describes how the believers mentioned before are genuine)
they believed (part of الَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا - those who believe)
from (connects to بَعْدُ to mean 'from after')
with you all (referring to the believers mentioned earlier in وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟)
from/among you all (referring to the believers mentioned earlier in وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟)
the blood relations (connected to أَوْلَىٰ - more entitled)
in (connects كِتٰبِ with what comes before)
Allah (as the object being referred to)
